name: Generic HTTP
description: Generic HTTP channel plugin for OpenClaw

setup.title: Generic HTTP Channel Setup
setup.summary: Configure a bridge/relay account, wire third-party webhooks into bridge ingress, and consume inbound events through stream polling.

accountFields.title: Bridge Base URL
accountFields.description: Base URL of the bridge or relay service that exposes health, probe, stream, resolve, and outbound endpoints.

accountFields.title: API Key
accountFields.description: Optional shared credential sent on signed requests when the bridge requires API key authentication.

accountFields.title: Signing Secret
accountFields.description: Shared secret used to sign stream, probe, resolve, and outbound requests from the plugin.

accountFields.title: Inbound Secret
accountFields.description: Optional dedicated secret used by the bridge when validating third-party webhook ingress.

accountFields.title: Outbound Secret
accountFields.description: Optional dedicated secret used when outbound message signing is separated from other transport signing.

steps.title: Configure bridge account
steps.description: Add at least one account with baseUrl and the shared credentials required by the bridge or relay.

steps.title: Wire webhook ingress
steps.description: Send third-party inbound events to POST /webhooks/inbound/messages on the bridge instead of calling a local OpenClaw URL.

steps.title: Activate stream ingress
steps.description: Let the host activate the plugin so it can poll GET /stream/inbound and acknowledge processed messages through POST /stream/acks.

steps.title: Verify outbound delivery
steps.description: Confirm the bridge accepts POST /outbound/messages and that the external system returns successful delivery responses.

schema.title: Generic HTTP Channel Config
schema.description: Configuration for the OpenClaw generic HTTP channel plugin using bridge/relay webhook and stream ingress.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the generic HTTP channel is enabled.

defaultAccount.title: Default Account
defaultAccount.description: Default account ID used when the host does not specify one.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Per-account bridge and outbound transport settings.

baseUrl.title: Bridge Base URL
baseUrl.description: Bridge or relay base URL used for probe, resolve, stream ingress, and outbound delivery.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Optional shared credential for bridge authentication.

signingSecret.title: Signing Secret
signingSecret.description: Shared secret used for signing outbound and stream transport requests.

inboundSecret.title: Inbound Secret
inboundSecret.description: Optional dedicated secret for inbound webhook validation on the bridge side.

outboundSecret.title: Outbound Secret
outboundSecret.description: Optional dedicated secret for outbound signing when outbound trust is split from inbound.

maxRetries.title: Max Retries
maxRetries.description: Maximum retry count for retryable outbound HTTP failures.

generic-http.label: Generic HTTP
generic-http.description: Bridge external systems into OpenClaw through webhook ingress and stream polling.
